channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dortmund scores 7 while Barcelona, Man City and Arsenal all win in Champions League
item.description: Karim Adeyemi starred as Borussia Dortmund ran riot against Celtic while Barcelona and Manchester City claimed their first wins in the restructured Champions League on Tuesday. Adeyemi scored a first-half hat trick as Dortmund routed Celtic 7-1 at home.
item.dc:creator: CIARÁN FAHEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Travis Kelce loses bet to Patrick Mahomes – what are the terms?
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs stars Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce made a wager ahead of a game between Texas Tech and Cincinnati over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans, Cal, Hannah McNair celebrate Founder’s Day, give $20,000 donation to Stephen F. Austin HS football team
item.description: Texans celebrate Founder's Day, give $20,000 donation to Stephen F. Austin High School today with Cal McNair, Hannah McNair, players Jon Weeks, Azeez Al-Shaair, J.J.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Seahawks' Kenneth Walker III somersaults to 1st down in incredible display of athleticism vs Lions
item.description: Seattle Seahawks running back Kenneth Walker III made an acrobatic play on Monday night against the Detroit Lions. He scored three touchdowns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani and the MLB playoffs, a pairing the world will experience for the 1st time
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani was already a superstar with his hitting and pitching accomplishments over six years with the Los Angeles Angels. Yet every October, Ohtani vanished, with the Angels having a losing record and never making the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry's gold-medal summer and 'nuit nuit' gesture still resonates as NBA camps open
item.description: Stephen Curry got the question and didn't even have to think about the answer. Someone wanted to know what French words that the Golden State Warriors star picked up during his gold-medal experience at the Paris Olympics this summer. “Nuit nuit,” Curry said. Of course.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Are professional athletes playing too many games?
item.description: Fans, athletes and medical experts have been having discussions on the increasing demand for players starting from the time they first start playing, all the way up to the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Favre tries to expand his defamation lawsuit against Mississippi auditor over welfare spending
item.description: Favre is not facing criminal charges, but he is among more than three dozen people or businesses the state is suing to try to recover misspent money through the Temporary Assistance for Needy Families program.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: Xfinity playoffs begin as Aric Almirola dominates Kansas Speedway
item.description: Aric Almirola clinched his second win of the 2024 NASCAR Xfinity Series season at the Kansas Lottery 300, held at Kansas Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: RSL gives up another late goal, settles for 2-2 draw
item.description: AUSTIN, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, Real Salt Lake looked like it had victory in its grasp. But for the second straight game, RSL gave up a late goal and had to settle for a draw.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: SJSU opponent forfeits volleyball match, lawsuit alleges player is transgender
item.description: (KRON) -- Boise State University's volleyball team forfeited a match against San Jose State, the school announced on Friday. The cancellation came after one San Jose State player said in a lawsuit that one of her teammates is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Jazz management excited about youth movement
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Back in April, Jazz CEO of Basketball Operations Danny Ainge had his sights on acquiring a big-name player. "Our objective is to find a player or two, and we're we're ready to roll," Ainge said five months ago. "We're ready to go big game hunting.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taillon pitches 7 crisp innings as the Cubs blank the Reds 1-0
item.description: Jameson Taillon pitched seven crisp innings in his second straight win, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Cincinnati Reds 1-0 on Friday in the opener of their season-ending series.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former BYU track and field sprinter dies in mountain biking crash
item.description: A former Brigham Young University track and field sprinter died Wednesday afternoon after a tragic mountain biking accident, according to a university press release.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: What's next for the Oakland Coliseum now that the A's are gone?
item.description: (KRON) -- After 57 years at the Oakland Coliseum, the Oakland Athletics played their final game there on Thursday, giving the fans something to celebrate with a 3-2 win over the Texas Rangers in front of a sell-out crowd.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani heads to 1st postseason after Dodgers clinch NL West title with a 7-2 win over Padres
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is headed to the postseason for the first time in his career after the Los Angeles Dodgers won the NL West on Thursday night by scoring five runs in the seventh inning in a 7-2 win over the second-place San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: RSL pushes for home playoff advantage in crucial showdown with Austin FC
item.description: Having clinched their playoff spot last weekend, RSL wants a top-four finish and the accompanying home-field advantage in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Derrick Rose, Chicago native and NBA MVP with the Bulls, announces retirement from pro basketball after 16 seasons
item.description: CHICAGO — Derrick Rose, a Chicago native and city basketball legend in every sense of the word, is retiring from professional basketball. Rose, who grew up in Englewood on the city's Southwest Side and was a prep star at Simeon before being drafted No.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
